reviews.review_msg: Imran Munir= excellence! Great TA and awesome prof! If you want a TA/Prof who is helpful and a good marker- take his class

Awesome TA.  Got papers back one week after submissive.  Very laid back but very knowledgable.  Second time I've had him as a TA.  Arguably the best TA I've ever had.  If you have the chance to have him as a TA or prof, you won't regret having him.

I've had the pleasure of being in Imran's class 3 times over my university career and he is one of the intelligent and most insightful individuals I know. He's laid back, but he's also very knowledgeable TA's I've ever met, not to mention he is the nicest guy ever. If you get him, take the time to talk to him, cuz he's got some amazing stories!

He is the slowest marker ever, he never went to lecture, and didn't seem to even understand what the class was about. If you are a student who is used to getting higher than a B+, don't take a class with him, because, as someone has already written, he seems to assign grades randomly.

Amazing T.A. Very easy going and always open to questions. I found him helpful and interesting--one of the best T.A.s I've had! And it is possible to get more than a B+ in the course with him as a T.A.-I finished with an A and it wasn't an unreasonable workload.
this guy is so laid back, you can do just about anything and he'll be ok with it.
Wicked guy, one of the greatest guys you will ever meet. Ask him questions he is harsh interesting, the guy knows his sh#t

Yes, yes.  The infamous CMNS 110 TA.  Good guy and easy marker (despite my rating of "2").  However, he marks everyone on the same level.  There's no way of getting anything above a B+ w/ him as a TA.
